title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at HCL Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at HCL Technologies
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies:
HCL Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies!
